---
title: "Big Tujunga Creek post fire analysis"
author:
  - name: Talula Wilmot
date: 03-08-2026
image: Tujunga.jpg
description: Station Fire effects on biotic and abotic systems
categories: [Writing] 
draft: false
---

This was a group project completed for my River Ecology class during the winter quarter of 2025 looking various affects on biotic and abiotic systems following the Station Fire in Big Tujunga Creek.

<iframe src="EEMB_148.pdf" width="100%" height="600px">

</iframe>
